DeepFilterNet runtime provenance

Repository: https://github.com/Rikorose/DeepFilterNet
Commit: d375b2d8309e0935d165700c91da9de862a99c31

Built locally on Windows with:
cargo build -p deep_filter --release --features capi

Local patch set on top of the upstream commit:
- added df_create_ext(...) for explicit runtime init parameters
- added df_set_thresholds(...) for live threshold tuning

Bundled artifact:
- libdf.dll (copied from upstream build output df.dll)
